name: HOODIE
description: 400gsm loop-back cotton. Boxy fit. Raw-cut seam along the hood. Garment-dyed for a washed hand-feel.

reviews.author: Y. M.
reviews.title: heaviest hoodie I own
reviews.body: Genuinely thick. Fit is true to size, maybe a hair boxy. Holds up after a dozen washes.

reviews.author: S. K.
reviews.title: worth the price
reviews.body: I was nervous spending this much on a hoodie. Not anymore. Seams are tight and it doesn't pill.

reviews.author: A. R.
reviews.title: great but heavy
reviews.body: Awesome quality, just don't expect to wear this in summer.

name: TEE
description: 240gsm open-end jersey. Dropped shoulder. Chest logo, tonal ink.

reviews.author: M. H.
reviews.title: perfect weight
reviews.body: Not flimsy, not stiff. Drapes nicely. Going to buy a second.

reviews.author: L. N.
reviews.title: size up
reviews.body: Runs a touch slim through the chest. M felt like an S to me.

name: PANTS
description: Heavy ripstop cargo. Hidden drawcord waist. Double-knee reinforcement. Deep thigh pockets.

reviews.author: K. S.
reviews.title: the only pants I wear now
reviews.body: Pockets are real pockets. Knee patches make a difference.

reviews.author: D. F.
reviews.title: built to last
reviews.body: Two months in and zero wear. The ripstop is the real deal.

reviews.author: T. A.
reviews.title: long but fixable
reviews.body: Length runs long but the bottom hem hides a hidden cinch.

name: MASK
description: Fine-gauge merino balaclava. 3-hole cut. Goes under a hood or stands alone.

reviews.author: R. E.
reviews.title: warm and not itchy
reviews.body: Most merino balaclavas itch. This one doesn't.

name: SHORTS
description: Mid-weight fleece shorts. Elastic waist, woven drawcord. Side split for walk.

reviews.author: N. B.
reviews.title: comfortable
reviews.body: Soft inside, holds shape. The split panel actually helps with mobility.

name: THE PIECE
description: Hand-dyed, numbered run of 50. Overdyed canvas with raw-edge patchwork. No two are identical.
caption: limited drop · 01

reviews.author: F. A.
reviews.title: art you wear
reviews.body: Got #14. The dye lines are different from the photo and I love that.

reviews.author: J. O.
reviews.title: investment piece
reviews.body: Heavy, structured, completely unique. Worth every pound.
